title: lynxking Dog Leash Slip Rope Lead Leash Strong Heavy Duty Braided Rope No Pull Training Lead Leashes for Medium Large and Small Dogs
features: Strong and durable: Our dog leash is made of high quality hiking nylon rope, the thin version [Small 3/8in] has a diameter of 3/8in (0.9 cm) and the thick version [Large 1/2in] has a diameter of 1/2in (1.3 cm) . Suitable for all types of dogs
Soft and comfortable handle: The foam used on the handle is very comfortable when the dog pulls and protects your hand from being strained
Style 1 - [Snap Lead]: Tested to withstand 400 lbs of impact quickly, the 360 degree swivel design ensures that the leash will not get tangled no matter how your dog moves
Style 2 -[Slip Lead]: The leash sliding design allows for a quick and gentle correction and has a leather slide to allow the collar to fit all neck sizes

Perfect lengths: With 4 lengths, 2ft (60 cm), 5ft (150 cm), 6ft(180 cm) and 8ft(240 cm), the leash offers a perfect balance between your control and your dog's freedom. It can take a lot of weight and is perfect for small, medium and large dogs of any breed
description: Product Description Lynxking Pet Supplies Lynxking is a pet supplies brand founded in 2016, we are professional supplier specialized in dog collars, leashes, harnesses and many other supplies. We are committed to providing customers with inexpensive products and services with professional skills and reliable quality to create value for you. Great dog leashes Lynxking snap leash and slip leash will be your best dog walking and training tool, bringing you safe, appropriate and enjoyable experience. SLIP LEASHES FOR SMALL DOGS Slip rope dog leash for small breed dogs over 6 pounds and under 32 pounds, dog collar and leash in one design Material: Polypropylene Closure Type: slip on Thickness: 3/8" (9.5MM) Length: 5 foot, 6 foot Color: Black, Blue, Orange, Pink, Grey, Purple, Brown and Red SNAP LEASHES FOR SMALL DOGS Snap rope dog leash for small breed dogs over 6 pounds and under 32 pounds, basic dog lead mached dog collar or harness Material: Polypropylene Closure Type: snap hook Thickness: 3/8" (9.5MM) Length: 5 foot, 6 foot Color: Black, Blue, Orange, Pink, Grey, Purple, Brown and Red SLIP LEASHES FOR LARGE DOGS Slip rope dog leash for medium and large dogs up to 32 pounds, dog collar and leash in one design Material: Polypropylene Closure Type: slip on Thickness: 1/2" (12.8MM) Length: 5 foot,6 foot, 8 foot Color: Black, Blue, Orange, Pink, Grey, Purple, Brown and Red SNAP LEASHES FOR LARGE DOGS Snap rope dog leash for medium and large dogs up to 32 pounds, basic dog lead mached dog collar or harness Material: Polypropylene Closure Type: snap hook Thickness: 1/2" (12.8MM) Length: 5 foot ,6 foot,8 foot Color: Black, Blue, Orange, Pink, Grey, Purple, Brown and Red Great for walking and running Snap leashes are basic leads that clip to your dog’s collar or harness. If you have a dog that walks nicely on a leash, this is probably the type of leash you’ll want to go with.. Lyxnking shock absorbing rope perfect balance between freedom and control, give enough freedom to your dog and everything absolutely under your control, great for running and walking in the park or in the field. Perfect for training Lynxking snap leash gives you some flexibility because you can always clip the leash to any type of training collar if necessary.Simple, practical and reusable design, the snap rope Leash matches Lynxking collars and harnesses, perfect solution for exercising and training. Dogs make us happy Our canine buddies are always there for us, in good times and in bad. They are our friends when we are lonely and a reason to laugh when we are down. They are faithful, judgment-free sounding boards who we can play with, snuggle with, and – most importantly – be ourselves with. Just need a dog leash, you can begin to enjoy a happy time with your dog.
